item.title: Anatsa banker returns: new overlay campaign targets 600+ financial apps
item.description: ESET researchers have observed a renewed Anatsa Android banking trojan campaign targeting hundreds of financial applications via overlay attacks.

item.title: EDR killers explained: Beyond the drivers
item.description: A deep dive into EDR-killer techniques across Windows and macOS — no named families in this retrospective.

item.title: Lazarus Group pivots: new Android banker disguised as crypto wallet
item.description: The Lazarus Group APT has been observed distributing a new Android banking trojan disguised as a cryptocurrency wallet application.
